name: Steak Diane
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oil to 375°F for 5 minutes.
2. Wipe half an inch thick steak with paper towels to remove excess moisture.
3. Mix dry mustard, salt, and pepper. Sprinkle over one side of the steak and rub in.
4. Brown the steak in hot oil for about 1 1/2 minutes on each side.
5. Sprinkle chives, lemon juice, and Worcestershire sauce over the steak.
6. At the table, pour heated cognac over the steak.
7. Ignite the flame when it appears.
8. Once the flame goes out, transfer the steak to a serving platter.
9. Spoon pan juices over the meat and serve.
